tasks.description: The predecessor task is already complete. handoff.json and result.json exist in outputs/handoff-exp/E_summary_only/run01/TASK-001/. This task is only the handoff source. HALF must inject it using the E_summary_only arm as one natural-language summary without structured field labels.

Use the E_summary_only handoff to implement src/inventory/api.py::search_items in https://github.com/beautyarbutin/handoff-fixture-inventory.git. Checkout branch handoff-exp/E_summary_only/run01 created from baseline ac64e8c; do not work on main. Reuse inventory.catalog.filter_items, support category, min_price, max_price and in_stock, ignore unknown query keys, raise ValueError for invalid min_price or max_price, and return plain dictionaries. Run python -m pytest tests evaluation_tests. Push code to the target branch and write handoff.json, usage.json and result.json under outputs/handoff-exp/E_summary_only/run01/TASK-002/ in the collaboration repository.
